announcements.title: sf-pi v0.141.0 — sf-browser: add session evidence and lightning navigation reliability
announcements.body: sf-browser: add session evidence and lightning navigation reliability — sf-browser: add session evidence report command

announcements.title: sf-pi requires pi 0.73 or newer
announcements.body: Current sf-pi builds require pi 0.73 or newer. Run `pi update` before upgrading sf-pi; PI_CODING_AGENT_SESSION_DIR remains supported for relocating session storage.
